testcase.name: test_create_group

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('id' in {'group': {'capacity': 15, 'created_at': '2026-03-13T18:16:45.596313+00:00', 'description': 'Test group for iteration 25', 'group_type_id': None, ...}, 'message': 'Group created successfully'} or 'name' in {'group': {'capacity': 15, 'created_at': '2026-03-13T18:16:45.596313+00:00', 'description': 'Test group for iteration 25', 'group_type_id': None, ...}, 'message': 'Group created successfully'})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_group_leader_events_iter25.py:290: in test_create_group assert "id" in data or "name" in data E AssertionError: assert ('id' in {'group': {'capacity': 15, 'created_at': '2026-03-13T18:16:45.596313+00:00', 'description': 'Test group for iteration 25', 'group_type_id': None, ...}, 'message': 'Group created successfully'} or 'name' in {'group': {'capacity': 15, 'created_at': '2026-03-13T18:16:45.596313+00:00', 'description': 'Test group for iteration 25', 'group_type_id': None, ...}, 'message': 'Group created successfully'})
